item.title: MIUI OS3.0.9.0.VNQCNXM Fastboot update for Redmi Note 13 5G / 13R Pro China
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi Note 13 5G / 13R Pro China

Version: OS3.0.9.0.VNQCNXM | 15.0

Size: 7.9 GB

MD5: 8fbf4887e3d72da38712f37531dbbc2f

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to May 2026. Increased system security.
